paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Jehovah spake unto Moses, saying,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, I am Jehovah your God.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: After the doings of the land of Egypt, wherein ye dwelt, shall ye not do: and after the doings of the land of Canaan, whither I bring you, shall ye not do; neither shall ye walk in their statutes.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Mine ordinances shall ye do, and my statutes shall ye keep, to walk therein: I am Jehovah your God.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Ye shall therefore keep my statutes, and mine ordinances; which if a man do, he shall live in them: I am Jehovah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: None of you shall approach to any that are near of kin to him, to uncover [their] nakedness: I am Jehovah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: The nakedness of thy father, even the nakedness of thy mother, shalt thou not uncover: she is thy mother; thou shalt not uncover her nakedness.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: The nakedness of thy father`s wife shalt thou not uncover: it is thy father`s nakedness.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: The nakedness of thy sister, the daughter of thy father, or the daughter of thy mother, whether born at home, or born abroad, even their nakedness thou shalt not uncover.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: The nakedness of thy son`s daughter, or of thy daughter`s daughter, even their nakedness thou shalt not uncover: for theirs is thine own nakedness.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: The nakedness of thy father`s wife`s daughter, begotten of thy father, she is thy sister, thou shalt not uncover her nakedness.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy father`s sister: she is thy father`s near kinswoman.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy mother`s sister: for she is thy mother`s near kinswoman.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy father`s brother, thou shalt not approach to his wife: she is thine aunt.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy daughter-in-law: she is thy son`s wife; thou shalt not uncover her nakedness.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy brother`s wife: it is thy brother`s nakedness.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of a woman and her daughter; thou shalt not take her son`s daughter, or her daughter`s daughter, to uncover her nakedness; they are near kinswomen: it is wickedness.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And thou shalt not take a wife to her sister, to be a rival [to her], to uncover her nakedness, besides the other in her life-time.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And thou shalt not approach unto a woman to uncover her nakedness, as long as she is impure by her uncleanness.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And thou shalt not lie carnally with thy neighbor`s wife, to defile thyself with her.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And thou shalt not give any of thy seed to make them pass through [the fire] to Molech; neither shalt thou profane the name of thy God: I am Jehovah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Thou shalt not lie with mankind, as with womankind: it is abomination.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And thou shalt not lie with any beast to defile thyself therewith; neither shall any woman stand before a beast, to lie down thereto: it is confusion.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Defile not ye yourselves in any of these things: for in all these the nations are defiled which I cast out from before you;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the land is defiled: therefore I do visit the iniquity thereof upon it, and the land vomiteth out her inhabitants.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Ye therefore shall keep my statutes and mine ordinances, and shall not do any of these abominations; neither the home-born, nor the stranger that sojourneth among you;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: (for all these abominations have the men of the land done, that were before you, and the land is defiled);

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: that the land vomit not you out also, when ye defile it, as it vomited out the nation that was before you.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: For whosoever shall do any of these abominations, even the souls that do them shall be cut off from among their people.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Therefore shall ye keep my charge, that ye practise not any of these abominable customs, which were practised before you, and that ye defile not yourselves therein: I am Jehovah your God.
